text: 🇮🇶 The US Justice Department has offered a $10 million reward for information on Abu Ala al-Walai, leader of the Iraqi Resistance group Kata'ib Sayyid al-Shuhada. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇶 美国司法部悬赏1000万美元，征集有关伊拉克抵抗组织“赛义德烈士旅”（Kata'ib Sayyid al-Shuhada）领导人阿布·阿拉·瓦莱（Abu Ala al-Walai）的情报。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇭 The United States has imposed sanctions on Cambodian Senator Kok An and 28 individuals and entities over alleged involvement in online scam operations tied to human trafficking and large scale fraud. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 AP : An 18 year old woman, Angelina Han Hicks, and a 16 year old were arrested over an alleged plot targeting a synagogue in Houston, with officials alleging they planned a mass casualty attack by driving into a congregation. Officials said both face conspiracy charges. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美联社：一名18岁女子安吉丽娜·韩·希克斯（Angelina Han Hicks）和一名16岁少年因涉嫌密谋袭击休斯顿的一座犹太教堂而被捕，官员称他们计划通过驾车冲撞会众来制造大规模伤亡袭击。官员表示，两人均面临共谋指控。@wfwitness

text: 🐻 What happened in the past 24 hours? Here's a summary: ➡️ The Iranian Gen Z team behind the viral Lego animations about the US war on Iran have given their first interview. ➡️ Slovenia's national broadcaster RTV will not air Eurovision this year, replacing it with a dedicated Palestinian programming week titled "Voices of Palestine." ➡️ US forces have seized another oil tanker in the Indian Ocean ➡️ The European Union expects Ukraine to repay the loan granted to it in the amount of €90 billion with "reparations from Russia" , and Dmitry Medvedev gives his opinion about the whole thing ➡️ Zelensky says Ukraine must build its own anti-ballistic missile capabilities as it cannot rely on the U.S. , and explains why they can't give up territory ➡️ Trump really hates media reports about his war on Iran ➡️ What was behind the air defense sounds in Tehran? ➡️ Trump answers whether he'd use nuclear weapons on Iran ➡️ A US Army Special Forces soldier who participated in the kidnapping of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has been arrested and charged with betting on the outcome of his own mission. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 过去24小时发生了什么？以下是摘要：➡️ 制作关于美国对伊朗战争的病毒式乐高动画的伊朗Z世代团队接受了他们的首次采访。➡️ 斯洛文尼亚国家广播公司RTV今年将不会转播欧洲歌唱大赛，取而代之的是一个名为“巴勒斯坦之声”的巴勒斯坦专题节目周。➡️ 美国军队在印度洋又扣押了一艘油轮。➡️ 欧盟期望乌克兰用“俄罗斯的赔款”偿还其向乌克兰提供的900亿欧元贷款，德米特里·梅德韦杰夫对此发表了他的看法。➡️ 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰必须建立自己的反弹道导弹能力，因为它不能依赖美国，并解释了他们为什么不能放弃领土。➡️ 特朗普非常讨厌关于他与伊朗开战的媒体报道。➡️ 德黑兰防空声音背后的原因是什么？➡️ 特朗普回答了他是否会对伊朗使用核武器的问题。➡️ 一名参与绑架委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的美国陆军特种部队士兵被捕，并被指控对自己任务的结果进行赌博。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor RT @RpsAgainstTrump : Eric Trump-Backed Startup Lands $24 Million Contract from His Father's Administration https://people.com/eric-trump-backed-startup-lands-usd24-million-contract-from-his-father-administration-11957625 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @RpsAgainstTrump：埃里克·特朗普支持的初创公司获得了他父亲政府的2400万美元合同 https://people.com/eric-trump-backed-startup-lands-usd24-million-contract-from-his-father-administration-11957625 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇦 🇮🇷 WSJ: Transit costs through the Panama Canal have surged since the outbreak of conflict in the Middle East has restricted transit through the Strait of Hormuz, with some vessels paying more than $1 million to secure priority passage. Average prices for preferrd transit slots have risen to $385,000 between March and April, up sharply from roughly $140,000 before the conflict began. Traffic through the canal has increased as well, with 6,288 transits recorded between October and March, up year-on-year, and peak days now seeing more than 40 vessels compared to an average of 34 per day earlier this year. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇦 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：自中东冲突爆发限制了霍尔木兹海峡的通行以来，巴拿马运河的过境成本飙升，一些船只支付超过100万美元以确保优先通行权。3月至4月期间，优先过境时段的平均价格已升至38.5万美元，较冲突开始前约14万美元的价格大幅上涨。运河的交通量也有所增加，10月至3月期间记录了6288次过境，同比有所增长，高峰日现在的过境船只超过40艘，而今年早些时候平均每天为34艘。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender On Tuesday, a day before John C. Phalen was removed from his position as U.S. Secretary of the Navy by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth after months of infighting with senior leaders and disagreements over how to revive the Navy’s struggling shipbuilding program, he said during a roundtable at the Navy League’s Sea Air Space 2026 that the Navy is looking to wrap up a review of the Ford-class and Nimitz-class aircraft carriers by the end of May. Pointing to a possibly major shift in the carrier acquisition strategy currently held by the U.S. Navy, including the potential cancellation of planned orders for additional Ford-class carriers and even a transition to a new design, as suggested last year by President Donald J. Trump, who has consistently criticized the Ford-class, and its electromagnetic catapults, known as the Electromagnetic Aircraft Launch System (EMALS). tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 周二，在约翰·C·法伦（John C. Phalen）因与高级领导层内斗数月以及在如何重振海军陷入困境的造船计划上存在分歧，被国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）免去美国海军部长职务的前一天，他在海军联盟2026年“海空天”博览会（Sea Air Space 2026）的圆桌会议上表示，海军正寻求在5月底前完成对福特级和尼米兹级航空母舰的审查。这指向了美国海军目前持有的航母采购战略可能发生重大转变，包括可能取消计划中额外福特级航母的订单，甚至转向新设计，正如唐纳德·J·特朗普总统去年所建议的那样，他一直批评福特级航母及其被称为电磁飞机弹射系统（EMALS）的电磁弹射器。 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Homes were flattened and extensive damage reported following a violent tornado near Vance Air Force Base in Enid, Oklahoma; search and rescue operations are underway for people trapped under debris, KOCO reports. WATCH: 🔴 A violent tornado is causing damage near Enid Air Force Base in Oklahoma. A tornado emergency has been declared. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047487282781774261/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据KOCO报道，俄克拉荷马州伊尼德（Enid）万斯空军基地（Vance Air Force Base）附近发生猛烈龙卷风，导致房屋被夷为平地，并造成大面积破坏；搜救行动正在进行中，以营救被困在废墟下的人员。观看：🔴 一场猛烈的龙卷风正在俄克拉荷马州伊尼德空军基地附近造成破坏。目前已宣布进入龙卷风紧急状态。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047487282781774261/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: WarMonitor Trump's not just resting his eyes, that's full on REM power napping. You can almost hear him snoring. https://x.com/atrupar/status/2047400412366397611/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普不仅仅是在闭目养神，那是在进行深度的快速眼动（REM）睡眠小憩。你几乎可以听到他的鼾声。 https://x.com/atrupar/status/2047400412366397611/video/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Authorities at Vance Air Force Base in Enid, OK, are responding to a tornado that has struck the base directly before continuing eastward in what the National Weather Service has deemed a "particularly dangerous situation." This video was posted to the Air Force amn/nco/snco Facebook page, purportedly from Vance AFB. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 位于俄克拉荷马州伊尼德的万斯空军基地的当局正在应对一场直接袭击该基地的龙卷风，随后龙卷风继续向东移动，国家气象局称这是一种“极其危险的情况”。这段视频被发布在空军amn/nco/snco Facebook页面上，据称来自万斯空军基地。 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: The war with Iran is already imposing significant financial strain on the U.S. military, with costs mounting rapidly and raising concerns about long-term sustainability, with munitions being pulled from stockpiles in Asia and Europe. The U.S. fired more than 1,000 tomahawk missiles, 10 times the number it buys each year curretly, and used more than 1,200 Patriot interceptor missiles and more than 1,000 precision strike and ATACMS missiles. U.S. military costs have already reached tens of billions of dollars, with estimates in early April placing the total between roughly $25 billion and $35 billion based on the estimates from two independent groups. U.S. Press Secretary Leavitt rejected the article as completely false. “the entire premise of this story is false. The United States of America has the most powerful military in the world, fully loaded with more than enough weapons and munitions, in stockpiles here at home and all around the globe, to effectively defend the homeland and achieve any military operation directed by the commander in chief.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：与伊朗的战争已经给美国军方带来了巨大的财政压力，成本迅速增加，引发了对长期可持续性的担忧，弹药正从亚洲和欧洲的库存中调拨。美国发射了超过1000枚战斧导弹，是目前每年采购数量的10倍，并使用了超过1200枚爱国者拦截导弹以及超过1000枚精确打击导弹和陆军战术导弹系统（ATACMS）。美国军费开支已经达到数百亿美元，根据两个独立团体的估计，4月初的总额大约在250亿至350亿美元之间。美国新闻秘书莱维特驳斥该报道完全虚假。“这篇报道的前提完全是错误的。美利坚合众国拥有世界上最强大的军队，在国内和全球各地的库存中储备了充足的武器和弹药，足以有效保卫国土并实现三军统帅下达的任何军事行动。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: The U.S. military is developing contingency plans to strike Iranian military assets and defences around the Strait of Hormuz if the ceasefire collapses, targeting naval forces, missile systems, drones, and mine-laying capabilities that could disrupt shipping. Officials say the objective would be to ensure freedom of navigation through the strait, which is a critical route for global oil supplies, while also protecting U.S. forces and commercial vessels in the region. The situation remains highly fluid, with the potential for escalation depending on whether ongoing negotiations succeed or the ceasefire breaks down. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：如果停火协议破裂，美国军方正在制定应急计划，以打击霍尔木兹海峡周边的伊朗军事资产和防御设施，目标包括可能扰乱航运的海军部队、导弹系统、无人机和布雷能力。官员们表示，其目标是确保通过该海峡的航行自由——这是全球石油供应的关键航线——同时保护该地区的美国军队和商船。局势仍然高度不稳定，升级的可能性取决于正在进行的谈判是否成功，或者停火协议是否破裂。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A large tornado is on the ground near Enid, Oklahoma, with reports of damage near Vance Air Force Base. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 俄克拉荷马州伊尼德附近出现大型龙卷风，据报道万斯空军基地附近有受损情况。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇻🇪Venezuelan Interior Minister Cabello reports that several corrupt judges and prosecutors have been removed from their positions or arrested. “And there, when it came to excuses, they invented any. In the end, sadly, that had become a recycling, a recycling…" ⚡️ 🇻🇪 Acting Venezuelan President Rodriguez says that not enough is being done to reform the Venezuelan justice system and calls on all relevant agencies to work together to address the issue. “It is not enough. Because we know all the actors that are part of the justice system, including the citizens’ security organizations, where it has also advanced, but where vices and deviations of power still persist, which must be corrected. I ask that all the competent organizations in the field advocate in a coordinated manner, as Venezuelans should do, to address this issue.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇻🇪委内瑞拉内政部长卡韦略报告称，几名腐败的法官和检察官已被免职或逮捕。‘当需要借口时，他们编造了各种理由。最终，可悲的是，这变成了一种循环，一种循环……’” ⚡️ 🇻🇪 委内瑞拉代理总统罗德里格斯表示，委内瑞拉司法系统的改革力度不够，并呼吁所有相关机构共同努力解决这一问题。“这还不够。因为我们了解司法系统的所有参与者，包括公民安全组织，虽然那里也有所进步，但恶习和权力偏差依然存在，必须予以纠正。我要求该领域所有主管组织以委内瑞拉人应有的方式协调一致，共同解决这一问题。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the U.S. Department of War, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine will hold a press conference tomorrow at 8 a.m. ET. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047476207415918860/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor The Trump administration has issued taxpayer-funded payouts to Trump-aligned figures, including $1.25M each to Carter Page and Michael Flynn, and $5 million to Ashli Babbitt’s estate, while Trump’s lawyers negotiate with the IRS over his own $10 billion lawsuit. (MS Now) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047474656374878289/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普政府已向特朗普阵营的相关人物发放了由纳税人资助的款项，包括向卡特·佩奇和迈克尔·弗林每人支付125万美元，向阿什莉·巴比特的遗产支付500万美元，同时特朗普的律师正在就他自己的一项100亿美元诉讼与美国国税局进行谈判。（MS Now）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047474656374878289/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇻🇪Venezuelan Interior Minister Cabello reports that some Venezuelan prisoners were detained in prisons for six years without seeing a date in court. “Approximately three years ago, a commission was established to review all that meant the number of people…" ⚡️ 🇻🇪 Venezuelan Interior Minister Cabello reports that several corrupt judges and prosecutors have been removed from their positions or arrested. “And there, when it came to excuses, they invented any. In the end, sadly, that had become a recycling, a recycling that has as a background, unfortunately, corruption cases. I’ll take you to court if you pay, if you pay. And that we have been dismantling, a number of prosecutors, judges have been removed and detained.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇻🇪委内瑞拉内政部长卡韦略报告称，一些委内瑞拉囚犯在监狱中被关押了六年，却从未见过法庭日期。“大约三年前，成立了一个委员会来审查所有这些意味着人数……” ⚡️ 🇻🇪 委内瑞拉内政部长卡韦略报告称，几名腐败的法官和检察官已被免职或逮捕。“在那里，当涉及到借口时，他们编造了各种借口。最后，可悲的是，这已经变成了一种循环，一种不幸地以腐败案件为背景的循环。如果你付钱，我就把你告上法庭，如果你付钱的话。我们一直在拆除这种现象，许多检察官、法官已被免职和拘留。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 Venezuelan Interior Minister Cabello reports that some Venezuelan prisoners were detained in prisons for six years without seeing a date in court. “Approximately three years ago, a commission was established to review all that meant the number of people arrested, the number of people who were subject to trial, why they were not attending the courts. There were even what we call the temporary detainees, who are in the police, in the National Guard, in the CICPC, many more people than those who were in the prisons already fixed as such. The very perverse prison system, very perverse. There were people there who were there up to six years for a SIM card and had never gone to court.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 委内瑞拉内政部长卡韦略报告称，一些委内瑞拉囚犯在监狱中被关押了六年，却从未见过法庭。“大约三年前，成立了一个委员会来审查所有被捕人数、受审人数以及他们为何没有出庭的情况。甚至还有我们所谓的临时被拘留者，他们被关在警察局、国民警卫队、CICPC中，人数比已经在固定监狱中的人还要多。非常腐败的监狱系统，非常腐败。有些人因为一张SIM卡被关在那里长达六年，却从未上过法庭。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian “Gnome” ground combat robot in service with the 65th MRB, seen here firing one of its RPGs. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047473545567973541/photo/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : Trump on Vladimir Putin possibly coming to the G20 in Miami: "If he came it would be probably very helpful" (Note how Trump then parrots Putin's talking points about the G7) https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2047454960598569359/video/1 tweet

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “If they [the USA] want to negotiate, we can negotiate. If they want to fight, we will fight.” According to the Iranian ambassador to Russia, Iran understands that the US President once tore up nuclear agreements and twice attacked the country during negotiations: “If they want to continue deceiving everyone, of course, Iran will fight to the end. But if they come to the conclusion that they can negotiate with us on the principles of mutual justice with precise and solid guarantees to ensure lasting peace, as well as to secure Iranian rights, and even pay compensation for all the damage... We are ready to negotiate only under such conditions.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “如果他们 [美国] 想谈判，我们可以谈判。如果他们想打仗，我们就打仗。” 据伊朗驻俄罗斯大使称，伊朗明白美国总统曾撕毁核协议，并在谈判期间两次袭击该国：“如果他们想继续欺骗所有人，伊朗当然会战斗到底。但如果他们得出结论，认为可以在相互公正的原则下与我们谈判，并提供精确而可靠的保证以确保持久和平，以及保障伊朗的权利，甚至赔偿所有损失……我们只愿意在这样的条件下进行谈判。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: U.S. Central Command Sailors aboard aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) serve meals to crew members. A typical aircraft carrier strike group serves around 4,000 eggs daily. Three aircraft carrier strike groups are currently operating in the Middle East. Combined, the Sailors and Marines from these units consume over 12,000 eggs each day. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）上的水兵们为船员提供餐食。一个典型的航母打击群每天供应约4000个鸡蛋。目前有三个航母打击群在中东地区执行任务。这些部队的水兵和海军陆战队员合计每天消耗超过12000个鸡蛋。推文

text: 🇹🇭 🇺🇸 A U.S. Navy chief crewman was attacked by a monkey while the ship was refueling in Phuket, Thailand, en route to the Strait of Hormuz. The sailor was medically evacuated to Japan for further treatment. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender A U.S. Special Forces Soldier involved in Operation Absolute Resolve, the capture in January of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, has been arrested by federal agents and charged for allegedly betting on the operation via the prediction market platform Polymarket, netting him $400,000 in profits, according to CNN. The Soldier, identified as Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke, an active-duty senior enlisted servicemember stationed at Fort Bragg, North Carolina, opened an account in late December on Polymarket. Betting a total of approximately $33,034 in 13 bets from December 27, 2025, through the evening of January 2, some only hours before the overnight operation to capture Maduro. Federal authorities state that Van Dyke “participated in the planning and execution of the U.S. military operation to capture Nicolás Maduro,” being charged with “unlawful use of confidential government information for personal gain, theft of nonpublic government information, commodities fraud, wire fraud, and making an unlawful monetary transaction.” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 据CNN报道，一名参与“绝对决心行动”（Operation Absolute Resolve，即1月份抓捕委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的行动）的美国特种部队士兵已被联邦特工逮捕，并被指控涉嫌通过预测市场平台Polymarket对该行动进行投注，获利40万美元。这名士兵被确认为加农·肯·范戴克（Gannon Ken Van Dyke）军士长，他是驻扎在北卡罗来纳州布拉格堡的现役高级士官，于12月下旬在Polymarket开设了账户。从2025年12月27日到1月2日晚，他在13次投注中总共投入了约33,034美元，其中一些投注距离抓捕马杜罗的夜间行动仅有数小时。联邦当局称，范戴克“参与了美国抓捕尼古拉斯·马杜罗军事行动的策划和执行”，被控“非法利用政府机密信息谋取个人利益、窃取非公开政府信息、商品欺诈、电信欺诈以及进行非法货币交易”。推文

text: Open Source Intel DOJ: U.S. soldier Gannon Ken Van Dyke charged with using classified information to win $400K+ betting on Nicolás Maduro’s removal; faces up to 60 years in prison, prosecutors seeking to seize proceeds. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047448226664444027/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国司法部：美国士兵加农·肯·范戴克因利用机密信息在尼古拉斯·马杜罗被捕事件中投注获利40多万美元而被起诉；面临最高60年监禁，检察官正寻求没收其非法所得。由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047448226664444027/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Apparently there was a special forces soldier who was involved in the capture of Venezuelan President Maduro, who was arrested by federal authorities today on suspicion of insider trading and betting on polymarket. US PRESIDENT TRUMP: Was he betting that they would get him or they wouldn't get him? tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 记者：显然有一名参与抓捕委内瑞拉总统马杜罗的特种部队士兵，今天因涉嫌内幕交易和在Polymarket上投注而被联邦当局逮捕。美国总统特朗普：他是押注他们能抓到他，还是抓不到他？推文

text: Javier Milei, the President of Argentina, is still in Israel. He has left the Western Wall and is now eating cake with the Israeli president.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱目前仍在以色列。他已经离开了西墙，现在正与以色列总统一起吃蛋糕。

text: 🇺🇸 BREAKING! A US Army Special Forces soldier who participated in the kidnapping of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has been arrested and charged with betting on the outcome of his own mission. Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke opened a Polymarket account in late December and wagered $32,000 that Maduro would be "out" by January — netting $400,000 in profit. The unusually large trade flagged by law enforcement led directly to his exposure. Van Dyke was indicted Thursday in connection with "Operation Absolute Resolve." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 突发！一名参与绑架委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的美国陆军特种部队士兵已被逮捕，并被指控对其自身任务的结果进行赌博。军士长加农·肯·范戴克（Gannon Ken Van Dyke）在12月下旬开设了一个Polymarket账户，并下注3.2万美元赌马杜罗将在1月“下台”——最终获利40万美元。执法部门发现这一异常巨额交易，直接导致其身份暴露。范戴克周四因与“绝对决心行动”（Operation Absolute Resolve）有关而被起诉。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺U.S. President Trump on reports that he has invited Russian President Putin to the G20 in Miami: Reporter: "Some reports say sort of that you're doing a student by to g 20 in Miami. Is that the case?" Trump: "No. But if he came, it would be probably…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Rubio on Iran's soccer team entering the U.S. for the World Cup. "There's nothing from The US has told them they can't come. I mean, the problem with Iran, it would be not their athletes. It would be some of the other people that we wanna bring with them, some of whom have ties to the IRGC. We may not be able to let them in, but not the athletes themselves. But no one's I don't know where that's coming from other than speculation that Iran may decide not to come and Italy would fill their spot. But that's they decide not to come on their own because they decided not to come. What they can't bring is a bunch of IRGC terrorists into our country." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺美国总统特朗普回应有关他邀请俄罗斯总统普京参加迈阿密G20峰会的报道：记者：“有报道称你正在迈阿密举办G20峰会。是这样吗？”特朗普：“不。但如果他来了，那可能会……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国务卿卢比奥谈及伊朗足球队进入美国参加世界杯。“美国没有任何规定说他们不能来。我的意思是，伊朗的问题不在于他们的运动员。而在于我们想要随他们一同入境的其他一些人，其中一些人与伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）有联系。我们可能无法让他们入境，但运动员本身是可以的。没人——我不知道这些说法从何而来，除了猜测伊朗可能决定不来，然后由意大利填补他们的空缺。但那是他们自己决定不来，因为他们决定不来。他们不能带一堆伊斯兰革命卫队的恐怖分子进入我们的国家。” @wfwitness

text: Argentina's President Javier Milei: Marx was a Satanist. Marxism is a satanic theory, a program opposed to God’s program.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱：马克思是撒旦崇拜者。马克思主义是一种撒旦理论，是一个与上帝计划背道而驰的纲领。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump says the U.S. has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz. "We have complete control. Now they can drop their minds in there and do all those stupid things. It's just gonna take longer for them to make money because the minds…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 U.S. President Trump on reports that he has invited Russian President Putin to the G20 in Miami: Reporter: "Some reports say sort of that you're doing a student by to g 20 in Miami. Is that the case?" Trump: "No. But if he came, it would be probably very helpful. You know, I've said a long time ago when they made the g eight, the g seven, they threw Russia out before my time. That was Obama and a certain prime minister from a place called Canada, Strudeau. And I said that that's a stupid thing to do." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普表示，美国完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。“我们拥有完全的控制权。现在他们可以在那里投放水雷并做所有那些愚蠢的事情。这只会让他们赚钱的时间变长，因为水雷……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国总统特朗普回应有关他邀请俄罗斯总统普京参加迈阿密G20峰会的报道：记者：“有报道称你正在迈阿密举办G20峰会。是这样吗？”特朗普：“不。但如果他来了，那可能会非常有帮助。你知道，很久以前当他们组建G8、G7时，在我任期之前就把俄罗斯踢出去了。那是奥巴马和来自加拿大那个叫斯特鲁多（Strudeau）的地方的某位总理干的。我说过那是一件愚蠢的事情。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧U.S. President Trump says that the Lebanese law banning contact with Israel has to come to an end. "I think we have to end that. Yeah. Okay. That's something we're gonna have to end. I've never heard of that, but that's a good start. It's a crime…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says the U.S. has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz. "We have complete control. Now they can drop their minds in there and do all those stupid things. It's just gonna take longer for them to make money because the minds are gonna affect them much more than they're gonna affect us. But, and we don't know that they're doing that, but they could be that they're if they if they're doing it, it's a very foolish thing to do." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧美国总统特朗普表示，黎巴嫩禁止与以色列接触的法律必须终结。“我认为我们必须结束它。是的。好的。那是我们必须结束的事情。我从未听说过这个，但这是一个好的开始。这是一种犯罪……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。“我们拥有完全的控制权。现在他们可以在那里投放水雷并做所有那些愚蠢的事情。这只会让他们赚钱的时间变长，因为水雷对他们的影响远大于对我们的影响。但是，我们不知道他们是否在这样做，但他们可能会——如果他们正在这样做，那是非常愚蠢的行为。” @wfwitness

The battlefield and diplomacy are fully coordinated fronts in the same war. Iranians are all united, more than ever before. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外长称“我们团结一致”，是的，是的，伊斯兰革命卫队扼住了所有人的喉咙。每个人都知道。拿枪的人说了算。伊朗外长阿拉格齐：以色列恐怖暗杀的失败反映在伊朗国家机构如何继续保持团结、目标明确和纪律严明地运作。战场和外交是同一场战争中完全协调的战线。伊朗人比以往任何时候都更加团结。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 💣 Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) navy laid more mines in the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, according to a U.S. official and a source with knowledge of the issue. Read the story by @MarcACaputo and me on @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/23/iran-strait-hormuz-mines-trump tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid ： 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 💣 据一名美国官员和一位知情人士透露，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军近日在霍尔木兹海峡布设了更多水雷。阅读 @MarcACaputo 和我关于 @axios 的报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/23/iran-strait-hormuz-mines-trump 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT WarTranslated The European Union has adopted its 20th sanctions package against Russia today. Here is what it includes: 🔹 A blow to the energy sector - new restrictions on oil, the "shadow fleet" and 46 tankers, a ban on operations with the ports of Murmansk and Tuapse; 🔹 Finance under pressure - sanctions against 20 Russian banks and the crypto sector, including a complete ban on Russian crypto platforms; 🔹 The Russian defense industry - restrictions on 58 companies and suppliers from third countries (China, the UAE, etc.); 🔹 Trade - new bans on the export of technologies and goods (for €360 million) and the import of Russian raw materials (for €570 million); 🔹 Separately - restrictions against Kyrgyzstan due to the risk of re-exporting goods to Russia; 🔹 LNG and ships - restrictions on the servicing of LNG tankers and new rules for the sale of ships; 🔹 Belarus - new sanctions against the defense industry and mirror restrictions against Russia. In total - 120 new sanctions positions and the largest package in two years. https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/press/press-releases/2026/04/23/russia-s-war-of-aggression-against-ukraine-20th-round-of-stern-eu-sanctions-hits-energy-military-industrial-complex-trade-and-financial-services-including-crypto/ tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT WarTranslated 欧盟今天通过了第20轮对俄制裁方案。内容包括：🔹 对能源部门的打击——对石油、“影子船队”和46艘油轮实施新限制，禁止与摩尔曼斯克港和图阿普谢港进行业务往来；🔹 金融承压——对20家俄罗斯银行和加密货币行业实施制裁，包括全面禁止俄罗斯加密货币平台；🔹 俄罗斯国防工业——对来自第三国（中国、阿联酋等）的58家公司和供应商实施限制；🔹 贸易——禁止出口技术和商品（价值3.6亿欧元）以及进口俄罗斯原材料（价值5.7亿欧元）的新禁令；🔹 单独列出——由于存在将商品转口至俄罗斯的风险，对吉尔吉斯斯坦实施限制；🔹 液化天然气（LNG）和船舶——限制液化天然气油轮的服务以及船舶销售的新规则；🔹 白俄罗斯——对国防工业实施新制裁，并对俄罗斯实施对等限制。总计——120项新制裁条款，这是两年来规模最大的一揽子方案。https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/press/press-releases/2026/04/23/russia-s-war-of-aggression-against-ukraine-20th-round-of-stern-eu-sanctions-hits-energy-military-industrial-complex-trade-and-financial-services-including-crypto/ 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪🇸🇦🇷🇺U.S. President Trump says that the U.S. doesn't have an oil shortage, and that they're producing more oil than Saudi Arabia and Russia combined. "We don't have an oil shortage. We have we drill baby drill. We we are right now producing more oil…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump says that the Lebanese law banning contact with Israel has to come to an end. "I think we have to end that. Yeah. Okay. That's something we're gonna have to end. I've never heard of that, but that's a good start. It's a crime to talk with Israel. Well, I'm pretty sure that that'll be ended very quickly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪🇸🇦🇷🇺美国总统特朗普表示，美国没有石油短缺，而且美国的石油产量超过了沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和。“我们没有石油短缺。我们有‘钻探，宝贝，钻探’。我们现在生产的石油……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普表示，黎巴嫩禁止与以色列接触的法律必须终结。“我认为我们必须结束它。是的。好的。那是我们必须结束的事情。我从未听说过那个，但那是一个好的开始。与以色列交谈是犯罪。嗯，我很确定那会很快结束。” @wfwitness
